resources.string: ⚠️ Device Admin: Inactive — tap Activate below
Required to prevent uninstallation without the partner PIN.
❌ Incorrect PIN. Contact your accountability partner.
Point the camera at the QR code provided by your Accountability Partner to set up this device.
Monitors text fields to prevent sending messages containing restricted keywords set by your accountability partner.
Tap to record your 15-second health check-in.
